narrative.headline: 2022 Dodge Durango: exterior lighting leads the owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 51 complaints with NHTSA. Exterior lighting is the most reported area at 41%, followed by the electrical system (20%) and the engine (20%). No crashes, injuries, or deaths are reported across any area, and only the electrical system shows a fire (1). Most complaints are about how things work day to day rather than safety incidents.

issues.title: Exterior Lighting
issues.blurb: The most reported area: 21 reports (41%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. Worth checking the lighting on a test drive.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Second most reported: 10 reports (20%), including 1 with fire. The fire count makes this the one electrical area worth a careful look.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 10 reports (20%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. A common complaint area but with no safety incidents attached.
